general.c(3) Library Functions Manual general.c(3)

NAME

general.c - General options.

SYNOPSIS

Variables


const registry_entry_t g_general_entries []

Detailed Description

General options.

General-purpose options including help, version, splash screen controls, status screen controls, and keepawake settings.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Definition in file general.c.

Variable Documentation

const registry_entry_t g_general_entries[]

Definition at line 18 of file general.c.

18                                            {
19     // GENERAL GROUP (binary-level + all modes)
20     {"help",
21      'h',
22      OPTION_TYPE_ACTION,
23      0,
24      NULL,
25      0,
26      "Show this help message and exit.",
27      "GENERAL",
28      NULL,
29      false,
30      NULL,
31      NULL,
32      NULL,
33      false,
34      false,
35      OPTION_MODE_BINARY | OPTION_MODE_SERVER | OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY_SVC |
36          OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
37      {0},
38      NULL},
39     {"version",
40      'v',
41      OPTION_TYPE_ACTION,
42      0,
43      NULL,
44      0,
45      "Show version information and exit.",
46      "GENERAL",
47      NULL,
48      false,
49      NULL,
50      NULL,
51      NULL,
52      false,
53      false,
54      OPTION_MODE_BINARY,
55      {0},
56      NULL},
57     {"splash-screen",
58      '\0',
59      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,
60      offsetof(options_t, splash_screen),
61      &default_splash_value,
62      sizeof(bool),
63      "Enable or disable splash screen with ASCII art. Overrides CLAUDECODE environment variable.",
64      "GENERAL",
65      NULL,
66      false,
67      "ASCII_CHAT_SPLASH_SCREEN",
68      NULL,
69      NULL,
70      false,
71      true, // optional_arg: allows --splash-screen to toggle or --splash-screen=true/false
72      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_MIRROR | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
73      {0},
74      NULL},
75     {"status-screen",
76      '\0',
77      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,
78      offsetof(options_t, status_screen),
79      &default_status_screen_value,
80      sizeof(bool),
81      "Enable or disable live status screen display. Overrides non-interactive terminal checks.",
82      "GENERAL",
83      NULL,
84      false,
85      "ASCII_CHAT_STATUS_SCREEN",
86      NULL,
87      NULL,
88      false,
89      true, // optional_arg: allows --status-screen to toggle or --status-screen=true/false
90      OPTION_MODE_SERVER | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY_SVC,
91      {0},
92      NULL},
93     {"keepawake",
94      '\0',
95      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,
96      offsetof(options_t, enable_keepawake),
97      &default_enable_keepawake_value,
98      sizeof(bool),
99      "Explicitly enable system sleep prevention (keepawake mode).",
100      "GENERAL",
101      NULL,
102      false,
103      "ASCII_CHAT_KEEPAWAKE",
104      NULL,
105      NULL,
106      false,
107      false,
108      OPTION_MODE_BINARY,
109      {0},
110      NULL},
111     {"no-keepawake",
112      '\0',
113      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,
114      offsetof(options_t, disable_keepawake),
115      &default_disable_keepawake_value,
116      sizeof(bool),
117      "Disable system sleep prevention (allow OS to sleep).",
118      "GENERAL",
119      NULL,

122      NULL,
123      NULL,
